content_hints.description: The approach to the enemy fortification is a narrow defile between collapsed buildings. The walls have been reinforced with bone -- femurs and ribs woven together in a lattice that holds the rubble in place. It is disturbingly functional. The air smells of turned earth and something sweet, like rotting fruit.
content_hints.read_aloud: The fortification rises from the ruined village like a growth. Bone-braced walls, a gate of lashed timber, and above it all, a banner of black fabric that moves even when the wind does not.
event_triggers: A banner of Blighter's forces hangs from the ramparts, black fabric writhing as if something lives inside it.

content_hints.description: The inner courtyard of the fortification. What was once a village square has been converted into a staging ground. Rotters stand in motionless ranks, their dead eyes fixed forward, awaiting orders that come from somewhere deeper inside. A Spitter crouches on the rooftop of a collapsed inn, acid dripping from its distended jaw.
content_hints.perception_success: The Black Oak Knight's armor bears the crest of an Orite cavalry regiment -- this was a Legionnaire once. The corruption has fused the armor to the body beneath.
event_triggers: The Black Oak Knight turns its helm toward you. No sound. No breath. Just the slow, deliberate movement of something that used to be human.

content_hints.description: Behind a barricaded door, a cellar holds salvageable supplies -- Legion crates marked with the quartermaster's seal. Someone stacked them here before the position was overrun. Ration tins, bandages, a crate of black-shot ammunition. On the wall, scratched into the stone with a knife point: 'WE HELD FOR THREE DAYS. REMEMBER US.'

loot.name: Legion Supply Cache
loot.description: Enough rations and ammunition to resupply a squad. Supply +2.

loot.name: Black-Shot Ammunition
loot.description: Alchemical rounds effective against undead. +1 effect on Skirmish actions vs. Broken.

content_hints.investigation_success: The crates are stamped with the 5th Company insignia -- Field Commander Alaria's original unit. She would want to know about this.
